title: kadsura japonica
intro: Kadsura japonica, also known as the Japanese kadsura or vinca berry, is a species of flowering plant in the family Schisandraceae. It is native to Japan and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Kadsura japonica include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Kadsura japonica include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory and cardiovascular conditions.
